'''vasate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:felinely|felinely]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-s-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:felinely|felinely]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vasate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || vasate
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || vasatesher
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || vasatesherëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || vasatero
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || vasateshë
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || vasateshëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokivasatero
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokivasateshë
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokivasateshëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || govasankerom
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || govasankeshë
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || govasankeshëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || govasankeya
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || vasaterom
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || vasatemu
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || vasateya
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokivasaterom
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokivasatemu
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokivasateya
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || vasasate
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || vasasatesher
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || vasasatesherëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || vasasatero
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || vasasateshë
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || vasasateshëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokivasasatero
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokivasasateshë
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokivasasateshëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || govasasankerom
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || govasasankeshë
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || govasasankeshëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || govasasankeya
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || vasasaterom
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || vasasatemu
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || vasasateya
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokivasasaterom
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokivasasatemu
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokivasasateya
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || væsæte
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || væsætesher
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || væsætesherëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || væsætero
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || væsæteshë
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || væsæteshëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokivæsætero
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokivæsæteshë
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokivæsæteshëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || govæsænkerom
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || govæsænkeshë
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || govæsænkeshëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || govæsænkeya
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || væsæterom
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || væsætemu
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || væsæteya
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokivæsæterom
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokivæsætemu
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokivæsæteya
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || vafsafte
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || vafsaftesher
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || vafsaftesherëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || vafsaftero
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || vafsafteshë
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || vafsafteshëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokivafsaftero
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokivafsafteshë
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokivafsafteshëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || govafsafnkerom
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || govafsafnkeshë
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || govafsafnkeshëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || govafsafnkeya
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || vafsafterom
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || vafsaftemu
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || vafsafteya
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokivafsafterom
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokivafsaftemu
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokivafsafteya
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
